name: RFISI: Internal Hosts Communicating with Anonymizer Host
notes: This rule will notify when an internal host appears to be using an anonymous proxy or vpn. This generally indicates a policy violation but may also signal insider threat activity. See https://ibm.biz/rfisi_threat_intel
conditions_text: when the context is Local to Remote
when any of Destination IP are contained in any of Anonymizer IPs - IP, XFE ATPF-anonsvcs_ipv4 - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY RFISI: Internal Hosts Communicating with Anonymizer Host on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the context is Local to Remote
AND when any of Destination IP are contained in any of Anonymizer IPs - IP, XFE ATPF-anonsvcs_ipv4 - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: RFISI: Internal Hosts Communicating with Anonymizer Host
Event description: An internal host appears to be using an anonymous proxy or vpn.
